feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Is it possible to call destination in template list report page?
entry.content: Is it possible to call destination in template list report page?

entry.title: BPI_FORMS_RUNTIME_SERVER_ERROR: Unable to each runtime server
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I’m currently working on a Business Process project using SAP Build Process Automation, and I’ve encountered a runtime server issue when trying to import the task UI of the workflow. The error message displayed is:

 

Process followed : 

1. Verify the HTML5 Applications in BTP :

2. Import your SAP UI5 form in SAP Build Process Automation



3. Filled the Import Form details:

 

Issue  : 





What I’ve Tried

  • Verified that all services in SAP BTP Cockpit are up and running.

  • Checked for any missing form configurations or deployment issues.

  • Tried redeploying the process and re-authenticating with my BTP account.

What I Need Help With

  • What exactly causes the BPI_FORMS_RUNTIME_SERVER_ERROR?

  • Are there specific services or destinations that must be enabled for the runtime server to be reachable?

  • Has anyone faced similar issues when working with SAP Build Process Automation forms or workflows?


    Environment Details

    • SAP BTP: Cloud Foundry environment

    • Service: SAP Build Process Automation

    • Use Case: Custom workflow with Task UI used for approvals

 

 

If anyone has faced and resolved this issue or has any insights your help would be greatly appreciated. Please feel free to share possible causes or diagnostic steps to try.

Thanks in advance!

 

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: How to achieve the data refresh in canvas page from list report SAP Fiori application?
entry.content:
We were given a task to improve a back-end RAP List Report application by including an action button, when clicked, opens a page with the tab-view data for the selected table rows. By using the canvas page extension scenario by referring this URL below
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/steps-to-navigate-to-a-canvas-custom-page-in-list-report-application/ba-p/13535400
as well as the SAP demo kit, I was able to accomplish this. But the issue is: When I navigate back to the first page (List report page) and again navigating to this canvas page after clicking the action button, the page does not load with the updated data; instead, the initially loaded data or screen remains visible, and the page does not automatically refresh with the newly selected table data.

I would like to find a way to make this UI page automatically load with the most recent data while navigating.

I am using below code for navigation:

this.extensionAPI.getNavigationController().navigateInternal({
                target: {
                    semanticObject: "repairpc",
                    action: "toCorrectionPage"
                }
            }, {
                routeName: "toCorrectionPage"
            });

On first navigation I have selected two rows, now on second navigation, I am selecting three rows as below screenshot and clicking on any of the actions button and navigating to a canvas page (UI page).

After Navigating, the below canvas page is still with the previous data, automatic refresh is not happening and after initial page load, onInit, onAfterRendering any of these functions aren't being triggered.

Anyone please assist me by providing any solutions/suggestions.

entry.title: OVP Cards with Mobile and Tablet
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’ve developed an OVP application that includes chart and table cards. The app functions perfectly on laptops and larger screens. However, I'm encountering some issues when accessing it on smaller devices such as tablets and mobile phones:

  • Dragging functionality does not work as expected; attempting to drag a card results in the card being deleted.

  • For the table card, only three columns are visible. There’s no option to drag or scroll to view the remaining columns.

Could you please advise on how to resolve these issues?

Best regards,

Abdul

entry.title: 'IAM APP' does not appear in eclipse
entry.content:
Hi guys

In eclipse I right click on the package and select New > Other Repository Object.

I try to create an 'IAM app' but it doesn't appear as if it doesn't exist:

I tried reinstalling the ABAP tools but the error persists

entry.title: RAP on Dynamic Condition Tables – Draft Enablement Challenge
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working on a requirement where the underlying tables are dynamic (condition tables). I need to build a RAP application on top of this setup. However, I'm facing a challenge: I can't enable draft functionality because the CDS view is a query implemented by a class, and draft is not supported in this scenario.

Draft functionality is crucial for my use case. Does anyone have experience with a similar setup or suggestions on how to handle this? Any ideas on enabling draft or dynamically handling such data in a RAP application would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: MultiInput in a table with item binding doesn't add tokens on Initial copy paste from excel
entry.content:
Our Fiori application's Object Page has a custom Facet, which has a table with item binding. The table cells have a multiInput field and a ValueHelp button. Please find the image attached below


We have a customer requirement wherein customers wish to paste multiple values from an excel file directly into a multi Input field in a single paste, which gets pasted as Tab Separated values.

When tab separated values are pasted into any of the above Multi Input fields for the first time, the initial paste gets omitted and only the last value from the tab separated values appear in the field.

Additional Information:
1) Even with addValidator added to the MultiInput field, the Tokens only get added when item binding is removed from the table. (Note: This issue only occurs for the first paste of the input, before any tokens have been added).
This is the addValidator function

oMultiInput.addValidator(function(args){
					var text = args.text;
					return new sap.m.Token({key: text, text: text});
			});


2) Furthermore, the change and tokenUpdate events don't seem to get triggered for this paste. However, the liveChange event does get triggered, which could potentially be used for a workaround (Not preferred).

3) The tokenUpdate event : 

onTokenUpdate: function (oControlEvent) {
    if (oControlEvent.getParameters().type == "removed") {
        var oRemovedTokens = oControlEvent.getParameters().removedTokens[0];
        var oObjectPageView = this.getObjectPageView();
        var oModel = oObjectPageView.getModel();
        var oAttribModel = oObjectPageView.getModel("AttributeLocal");
        if (oRemovedTokens) {
            var tokenKey = oRemovedTokens.data("Key0");
            var attributeKey = oRemovedTokens.data("Key1");
            var dTeamID = oRemovedTokens.data("Key2");

            var sPath = "/C_RespyMgmtTeamAttributeTP(RespyMgmtTeamAttributeValueID=\'" + attributeKey + "\'" +
                ",RespyMgmtTeamID=\'" + dTeamID + "\'" + ",DraftUUID=guid\'" + tokenKey + "\'" + ",IsActiveEntity=false)";

            oModel.remove(sPath, {
                success: function (oData) {
                    var resArray = oAttribModel.getProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData");
                    var delFlag = false;
                    for (var k = 0; k < resArray.length; k++) {
                        if (resArray[k].DraftUUID === tokenKey && !delFlag) {
                            resArray.splice(k, 1);
                            oAttribModel.setProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData", resArray);
                            delFlag = true;
                        }
                    }
                    oModel.refresh(true);
                },
                error: function (oError) {
                }
            });
        }
    }
    if (oControlEvent.getParameters().type == "added") {
        for (var i = 0; i < oControlEvent.getParameters().addedTokens.length; i++) {
            var oMultiInput = oControlEvent.getSource();
            var oAttributeValue = oControlEvent.getParameters().addedTokens[i].getAggregation("customData")[0].getValue().value1;
            oMultiInput.setValue("");
            if (oAttributeValue) {
                var oAttributeName = oMultiInput.data("coords0");
                var attributeUnit = oMultiInput.data("Key5");
                var attributeCurrency = oMultiInput.data("Key6");
                // code for supporting manual input of tokens for all operators
                var oTokenParser = new TokenParser();
                oTokenParser.addKeyField({
                    key: oAttributeName,
                    label: oAttributeName,
                    type: "string"
                });
                oTokenParser.setDefaultOperation("EQ");
                oTokenParser.associateInput(oMultiInput);
                var oNewToken = oMultiInput._validateToken({
                    text: oAttributeValue
                });

                var temp = 0;
                var oRange = oNewToken.data().range;
                var option = oRange.operation;
                var Low = oRange.value1;
                Low = Low.toUpperCase(Low);
                var High = oRange.value2;
                if (High) {
                    High = High.toUpperCase(High);
                }
                var Exclude = oRange.exclude;
                if (option === "Contains" || option === "StartsWith" || option === "EndsWith") {
                    temp = this.checkEscapeCharacter(Low);
                    Low = this.operatorChangeForRanges(Low, option, temp);
                    option = "CP";
                }
                // end of code for supporting manual input of tokens for all operators
                var oObjectPageView = this.getObjectPageView();
                var oModel = oObjectPageView.getModel();
                var oAttribModel = oObjectPageView.getModel("AttributeLocal");
                var oBindingContext = oObjectPageView.getBindingContext();
                var sPath = oBindingContext.getPath();
                sPath = sPath + "/to_Attribute";
                var DraftUUID = oBindingContext.getObject().DraftUUID;
                var data = {
                    ParentDraftUUID: DraftUUID,
                    RespyMgmtReferenceAttribName: oAttributeName,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeOption: option,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeSign: Exclude ? "E" : "I",
                    RespyMgmtAttributeLowValue: Low,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeHighValue: High,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeUnit: attributeUnit,
                    RespyMgmtAttributeCurrencyKey: attributeCurrency
                };
                oModel.create(sPath, data, {
                    success: function (oData, oResponse) {
                        oData.RespyMTeamAttributeIsEditable = true;
                        var resArray = oAttribModel.getProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData");
                        resArray.push(oData);
                        oAttribModel.setProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData", resArray);
                        oModel.refresh(true);
                    },
                    error: function (oError) { }
                });

            }
        }
    }
},

4) The change event : 

onInputAttribute: function (oControlEvent) {
			var oMultiInput = oControlEvent.getSource();
			var oAttributeValue = oControlEvent.getParameters().value;
			oMultiInput.setValue("");
			if (oAttributeValue) {
				var oAttributeName = oMultiInput.data("coords0");
				var attributeUnit = oMultiInput.data("Key5");
				var attributeCurrency = oMultiInput.data("Key6");
				// code for supporting manual input of tokens for all operators
				var oTokenParser = new TokenParser();
				oTokenParser.addKeyField({
					key: oAttributeName,
					label: oAttributeName,
					type: "string"
				});
				oTokenParser.setDefaultOperation("EQ");
				oTokenParser.associateInput(oMultiInput);
				var oNewToken = oMultiInput._validateToken({
					text: oAttributeValue
				});

				var temp = 0;
				var oRange = oNewToken.data().range;
				var option = oRange.operation;
				var Low = oRange.value1;
				Low = Low.toUpperCase(Low);
				var High = oRange.value2;
				if (High) {
					High = High.toUpperCase(High);
				}
				var Exclude = oRange.exclude;
				if (option === "Contains" || option === "StartsWith" || option === "EndsWith") {
					temp = this.checkEscapeCharacter(Low);
					Low = this.operatorChangeForRanges(Low, option, temp);
					option = "CP";
				}
				// end of code for supporting manual input of tokens for all operators
				var oObjectPageView = this.getObjectPageView();
				var oModel = oObjectPageView.getModel();
				var oAttribModel = oObjectPageView.getModel("AttributeLocal");
				var oBindingContext = oObjectPageView.getBindingContext();
				var sPath = oBindingContext.getPath();
				sPath = sPath + "/to_Attribute";
				var DraftUUID = oBindingContext.getObject().DraftUUID;
				var data = {
					ParentDraftUUID: DraftUUID,
					RespyMgmtReferenceAttribName: oAttributeName,
					RespyMgmtAttributeOption: option,
					RespyMgmtAttributeSign: Exclude ? "E" : "I",
					RespyMgmtAttributeLowValue: Low,
					RespyMgmtAttributeHighValue: High,
					RespyMgmtAttributeUnit: attributeUnit,
					RespyMgmtAttributeCurrencyKey: attributeCurrency
				};

				oModel.create(sPath, data, {
					success: function (oData, oResponse) {
						oData.RespyMTeamAttributeIsEditable = true;
						var resArray = oAttribModel.getProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData");
						resArray.push(oData);
						oAttribModel.setProperty("/RespyMgmtAttributeData", resArray);
						oModel.refresh(true);
					},
					error: function (oError) {}
				});

			}
		}

entry.title: Fiori Reuse Library
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have an interesting problem.

We developed a Fiori app using Business Application Studio (BAS) and integrated the Reuse Component for Change Documents following the provided instructions (How to Use the Fiori Reuse Library | SAP Help Portal)

The app runs perfectly in BAS. However, after deployed it to the Public Cloud. The apps failed to run, showing the error:""
My source code Reuse Library: Reuse_library 
Am i missing any permissions to use Reuse Library in Customizing.

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  

SAPUI5  

SAP Fiori

entry.title: Asset Accounting Overview - avaiable cards
entry.content:
Hello,

what can cause a difference in set of cards avaiable for display in F3096 - Asset Accounting Overview between dev/test environments (14 vs 8):

 

 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F3096')/S29OP

entry.title: Error "Rule Service with given ID does not exist" when Consuming Decision Table API(SBPA)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created a decision table in SAP Build Process Automation and have successfully released and deployed the project. Following this, I created a trigger from the deployed decision table.

However, when I try to consume this API via Postman, I encounter the following error message:

"The rule service with given id xxxxxxxxxxxxx does not exist."

Has anyone come across this error before? Any insights or suggestions to resolve this would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: Value help view without text-view in SCFD_EUI
entry.content:
Hi SAP-Experts,

I want to enable a custom ZZ-field of the include CI_CSKS for the FIORI-APP. The ZZ-field has a check table. In SCFD_EUI. The semantic type is LIST (for Code List). SCFD_EUI generates two cds-templates for the value help view. One for the code view and one for the text view. I would use the check table for code view. But I don't have a text table for the text view.

Can I create a value help view with a code view, but without a text view ? If yes, how can I do it? Or do I always have to implement a code view and a text view? In this case, I have to create a text table for the check table, right ?

Thanks for any help.

entry.title: How to add custom fields in Long Term Supplier Declaration Inbound Fiori app in SAP GTS
entry.content:
Hi ,

In SAP GTS , there are no CFL to add custom fields to standard apps . Can you please guide step by step how to add custom fields like producer code and net cost to Long Term Supplier Declaration Inbound Standard Fiori APP .

Also if standard fiori app needs to be copied to custom fiori app , what are the ABAP required changes to be done for custom fiori app.

Detailed Explanation with Example would be appreciated .

Regards,

SN

SAP Global Trade Services  @SAP  SAP Fiori OData

entry.title: Fiori Tile loading issues
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I am searching MM03 in fiori, it shows all items related to MM03.

Herewith I attach the screeshot for your reference.

entry.title: fiori app
entry.content: hi Masters I have a CDS view in S4 system I want to create one fiori app for that CDS view and I want to launch it with fiori app pad how to do please help I am very new in SAP

entry.title: Getting error while adding New system in VS CODE using SAP Fiori generator.
entry.content:
In SAP Fiori Generator, Data Source and Service Selection->Connect to system->ABAP on Premise->enter system URL->user->login. I am getting dump in the wizard.Pls suggest.

Observations

1. In my system its shows -1, but in others system it shows blank. 

2. The generator is working fine if I directly connect to the odata services, but gives error during system connect.

 

 

 

 

{"message":"@sap/fiori:app generator failed - {\"message\":\"Could not update method 'validate' in 'abapOnPrem:serviceSelection' question in generator '@sap/fiori:app' - evaluateMethod() Cannot read properties of null (reading 'value')\",\"stack\":\"TypeError: evaluateMethod() Cannot read properties of null (reading 'value')\\n at Fiori.validate (C:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\AppData\\\\Roaming\\\\npm\\\\node_modules\\\\@sap\\\\generator-fiori\\\\generators\\\\open-ux-shared\\\\index.js:1:1283672)\\n at w.<anonymous> (c:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\\\sapos.yeoman-ui-1.16.7\\\\dist\\\\extension.js:2:2746217)\\n at Generator.next (<anonymous>)\\n at c:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\\\sapos.yeoman-ui-1.16.7\\\\dist\\\\extension.js:2:2740597\\n at new Promise (<anonymous>)\\n at r (c:\\\\Users\\\\username\\\\.vscode\\\\extensions\\\\sapos.yeoman-ui-1.16.7\\\\dist\\\\extension.js:2:2740342)\\n at w.evaluateMethod (c:\\\\Users\\\\username...

entry.title: Executing BW Queries in background mode
entry.content:
Hi Community, 

We are using SAP S/4 HANA On premise with Fiori. 

I am looking for ways to improve query performance. Some queries which are created with the fiori app: "custom analytical queries" are taking too long to load, resulting in browser errors. Therefore, I am also looking for ways to execute these BW queries in the background. Either via SAP GUI or SAP Fiori. Can anyone help me? 

Via other community posts I see the transaction RSBATCH coming up several times but the transaction is not very user friendly. Is this the right way forward?  


Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to send multiple default values for a smart filter property from SAP ABAP OData?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send multiple default values for a smart filter property maintained in UI from SAP ABAP OData service DEFINE method. By using set_default_value I could send only one default value.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Forgot Password link in Fiori Launchpad login screen
entry.content:
do any of you have documentation on how to successfully implement the password reset function as suggested in SAP note “2565111 - Forgot password functionality in SAP Fiori Launchpad logon page is not available”.

 

BR

Marco

entry.title: SAP CAP + Fiori Elements + fiori-tools-servestatic
entry.content:
Hello all,
 
we are facing some issues since a few days with loading a custom lib. It seems that a 
 
cds watch 
 
isn't serving paths of a Fiori elements app correctly which are configured over the middleware task fiori-tools-servestatic. The log says that it is served but over the browser we are not able to access it.
Over a ui serve of the app it's working.
 
server:
  customMiddleware:   
    - name: fiori-tools-servestatic
      afterMiddleware: compression
      configuration:
        paths:
          - path: /testIT
            src: "/home/user/projects/myproject/test"
 
As a result custom libs can not be loaded in BAS / Build Code when running cds watch.
 
CAP version is 9, but it is not working with the latest 8 version neither. 
"cds-plugin-ui5": "^0.13.0" ist in use as well.
 
Anybody an idea what has changed?

entry.title: Fiori App My Team Calendar (F1309B) metadata issue
entry.content:
Hello Expert, i'm facing an issue with le application F1309B (2023 FPS02 o,n premise).

After completing all the steps to add in the fiorilaunchpad ( SICF node activation), publish the OData V4 Service Group UI_HCMMYTEAMCALENDAR_V4, create the semantic object, the target mapping etc...), i'm facing these issue on the load of the application.

Type cannot be determined, no metadata for path: /TeamCalendarShareMode/_PersonWorkAgreement/HCMIsMainPersonWorkAgreement - Error: Type cannot be determined, no metadata for path: /TeamCalendarShareMode/_PersonWorkAgreement/HCMIsMainPersonWorkAgreement

Failed to get contexts for /sap/opu/odata4/sap/ui_hcmmyteamcalendar_v4/srvd/sap/ui_hcmmyteamcalendar/0001/TeamCalendarShareMode with start index 0 and length Infinity - Error: Type cannot be determined, no metadata for path: /TeamCalendarShareMode/_PersonWorkAgreement/HCMIsMainPersonWorkAgreement

Could you help me in finding what i'm missing here?

Thanks a lot
